gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: الول مرسل والثاني ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/410)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: الول مرسل والثاني ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/410)
text: ا مَا مِنْ أَحَدٍ إِلَّا وَ هُوَ يُصِيبُ حَظّاً مِنَ الزِّنَى فَزِنَى الْعَيْنَيْنِ النَّظَرُ وَ زِنَى الْفَمِ الْقُبْلَةُ وَ زِنَى الْيَدَيْنِ اللَّمْسُ صَدَّقَ الْفَرْجُ ذَلِكَ أَمْ كَذَّبَ

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Najran, from the one who mentioned it, from Abu Abdullahasws; and Yazeed Bin Hammad and someone else, from Abu Jameela,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> and Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> both having said: ‘There is no one except that he has share in the adultery, so he committed adultery of the eyes, the (lustful) look, and the adultery of the mouth, the kissing, and adultery of the hands, the touching, whether the private parts react to it or not’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from ibn abu Najran from those whom he has mentioned from abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al- Salam, and Yazid ibn Hammad and others from abu Jamilah who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, and abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, have said, ‘There is no one without a share in fornication. Fornication of the eyes is looking, of the mouth is kissing, of hands is touching, regardless if the genital organs materialize it or not.’”
